tasks.surveys_desc: Share your opinion in short, verified surveys and earn cash instantly. Clear rewards, no guessing.

tasks.offers_desc: Sign up, test apps, or complete simple forms to earn easy rewards in just a few clicks.

start_earning.q: How can I start earning on LabWard?
start_earning.a: Creating an account on LabWard is quick and easy. You can sign up using your email, Google, Facebook, or Steam. Once logged in, you'll have access to the Earn section to complete offers and the Games section to play Boxes and Battles. Just sign in and start exploring.

payout_methods.q: How many payout methods are available?
payout_methods.a: LabWard supports over 15 payout methods including PayPal, Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, VISA gift cards, Steam wallet codes, Google Play credits, Amazon gift cards, and more. We are constantly adding new payout options based on user feedback.

withdraw.q: How do I withdraw from LabWard?
withdraw.a: Navigate to the Rewards section in your dashboard, select your preferred payout method, enter the withdrawal amount (minimum $0.50), and confirm the transaction. Your earnings will be sent within the processing time for that method.

withdraw_time.q: How long does the withdrawal take?
withdraw_time.a: Most withdrawals are processed within 24 hours. Crypto payments (BTC, ETH, SOL) usually arrive within minutes. PayPal transfers take 1–2 business days. Gift card codes are typically delivered instantly via email after approval.

worldwide.a: Yes! LabWard is available in over 180 countries. However, some specific offers and surveys may be region-locked depending on advertiser requirements. More populated regions tend to have more available tasks.

cta.desc: Join thousands completing simple tasks, playing games, and answering surveys to earn real cash and rewards. It only takes a few minutes to get started.

testimonials_cards.leslie_text: I was skeptical at first, but after completing just a few surveys I was able to cash out directly to my PayPal. Fast, simple, and legit — I'm hooked!
testimonials_cards.bessie_text: I honestly didn't expect much at first, but LabWards surprised me. The tasks are simple, payouts are fast, and everything works exactly as promised.
testimonials_cards.brooklyn_text: What I like most about LabWards is how straightforward it is. No confusing steps, no hidden tricks. I complete surveys or offers in my free time and the earnings add up quickly!
testimonials_cards.cameron_text: I've been using LabWards for three months and I'm consistently earning extra cash just from daily offers and surveys. Best platform I've found for making money online!
testimonials_cards.robert_text: The payout sp,eed is unmatched. I requested my first Bitcoin withdrawal and it arrived in under 10 minutes. Definitely recommend LabWards to anyone looking to earn online.

footer.description: Sign up today and grab your instant bonus. Every task completed puts money in your pocket.

intro.text: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how we use them, and your choices regarding their use.

what_are_cookies.title: What Are Cookies
what_are_cookies.description_1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and how you interact with them.
what_are_cookies.description_2: We also use similar technologies like web beacons, pixels, and local storage. When we say cookies, we include all of these.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Required for the website to function properly including security, authentication, and sessions.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how users interact with our website anonymously.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to show relevant ads based on browsing behavior.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: Enable personalization like remembering preferences and settings.

third_party.title: Third-Party Cookies
third_party.description: Some cookies are set by third-party services.
third_party.note: These third parties have their own privacy policies.

browser.title: Managing Cookies in Your Browser
browser.note: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Blocking cookies may affect site functionality.
browser.warning: Some features may not work properly without essential cookies.

items.edge: Settings → Privacy, search, and services → Cookies

contact.title: Questions About Cookies?
contact.text: If you have questions about our cookie usage, contact us:

cookie_page.warning1: Note: Blocking or deleting cookies may affect your experience on our site. Some features may not work properly without essential cookies.

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.question1: How do I create an account?
getting_started.answer1: Creating an account is easy! Click on Sign Up and register using your email or social account.
getting_started.answer2: Yes! LabWards is completely free to use with no hidden charges.

getting_started.question4: Is LabWards available in my country?
getting_started.answer4: LabWards is available in most countries worldwide.

earning_tasks.title: Earning & Tasks
earning_tasks.question1: How do I earn money on LabWards?
earning_tasks.answer1: Earn by completing games, surveys, offers, videos, and app testing.
earning_tasks.answer2: This can happen due to VPN usage, incomplete steps, or advertiser rejection.
earning_tasks.question3: How long does it take for rewards to credit?
earning_tasks.answer3: Most rewards are instant, but some may take 24–48 hours.
earning_tasks.question4: Can I complete the same task multiple times?
earning_tasks.answer4: Most tasks can only be completed once.

payments.question1: What is the minimum withdrawal amount?

payments.answer3: PayPal, bank transfer, crypto, and gift cards.
payments.answer4: Most payment methods have no withdrawal fees.

intro.text: At LabWards, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information when you use our services. By using LabWards, you consent to the practices described in this policy.

personal_items.item1: Name, email address, and date of birth
personal_items.item2: Payment information (PayPal email, crypto wallet address)
personal_items.item3: Profile information you choose to provide

auto_items.item3: Usage data (pages visited, tasks completed, time spent)

third_party_items.item2: Task completion data from advertising partners

items.item1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
items.item2: Process transactions and send related information
items.item3: Verify your identity and prevent fraud
items.item4: Match you with relevant tasks and surveys
items.item5: Communicate with you about updates, promotions, and support
items.item6: Analyze usage patterns to improve user experience
items.item8: Protect the security and integrity of our platform

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.description: We may share your information with:

items.item1: Advertising Partners: To verify task completions and process rewards
items.item2: Payment Processors: To process withdrawals and payments
items.item3: Service Providers: Who assist in operating our platform (hosting, analytics, support)
items.item4: Legal Authorities: When required by law or to protect our rights

sharing.note: We do NOT sell your personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes.

security.title: Data Security
security.description: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:

items.item1: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmission
items.item2: Secure, encrypted storage for sensitive information
items.item3: Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
items.item4: Access controls and authentication for our systems
items.item5: Employee training on data protection practices

security.note: While we strive to protect your information, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

rights.title: Your Rights & Choices

items.item12: Request a copy of your personal data
items.item32: Request deletion of your personal data
items.item52: Receive your data in a portable format
items.item62: Limit how we use your data

rights.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.description: We retain your personal information for as long as:

items.item3: Required by law (tax records, legal obligations)
items.item4: Needed to resolve disputes or enforce agreements

retention.note: After account deletion, we may retain certain information in anonymized form for analytics purposes or as required by law.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, contact us:

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing or using LabWards ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use the Service.
acceptance.p2: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.item1: Be at least 18 years of age
eligibility.item2: Have the legal capacity to enter into binding agreements
eligibility.item3: Not be prohibited from using the Service under applicable laws
eligibility.item4: Provide accurate and complete registration information
eligibility.outro: The Service may not be available in all jurisdictions. It is your responsibility to ensure compliance with local laws.

account.title: Account Registration
account.intro: When creating an account, you agree to:
account.item1: Provide accurate, current, and complete information
account.item2: Maintain and update your information as needed
account.item3: Keep your password secure and confidential
account.item4: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
account.item5: Create only one account per person
account.outro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these requirements or are suspected of fraudulent activity.

services.title: Services
services.intro: LabWards provides a platform where users can earn rewards by completing various tasks, including but not limited to:
services.outro: Task availability, rewards, and terms may vary and are subject to change without notice. Third-party offers are governed by the respective third party's terms and conditions.

earnings.title: Earnings & Payments
earnings.item1: Earnings are credited upon successful task completion and verification
earnings.item2: Minimum withdrawal amounts apply and may vary by payment method
earnings.item3: We reserve the right to adjust earnings if fraud or errors are detected
earnings.item4: Pending earnings may be forfeited if your account is terminated for violations
earnings.item5: You are responsible for any taxes applicable to your earnings
earnings.outro: Payment processing times vary depending on the payment method selected. We are not responsible for delays caused by third-party payment processors.

conduct.title: User Conduct
conduct.item1: Create multiple accounts or use fake identities
conduct.item2: Use VPNs, proxies, or tools to mask your location
conduct.item3: Use bots, scripts, or automated methods to complete tasks
conduct.item4: Provide false information or submit fraudulent completions
conduct.item5: Attempt to manipulate or exploit the referral system
conduct.item6: Share account access or sell your account
conduct.item7: Harass, abuse, or harm other users or staff
conduct.item8: Violate any applicable laws or third-party rights
conduct.warning: Violations may result in account suspension, forfeiture of earnings, and permanent ban from the platform.

termination.title: Termination
termination.intro: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time, with or without cause, with or without notice. Reasons for termination may include:
termination.item4: Request by law enforcement or government agency
termination.outro: You may also terminate your account at any time through your account settings. Upon termination, you must withdraw any eligible earnings within 30 days.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND. TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW:
liability.item1: We disclaim all warranties, express or implied
liability.item2: We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
liability.item3: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you have earned in the past 12 months
liability.item4: We are not responsible for third-party services or offers

questions.title: We've Got the Answers You Need
questions.description: Find quick answers to the most common questions about earning, payouts, referrals, and more

q1.question: How do I start earning on Labwards?
q1.answer1: Create a free account and log in.
q1.answer2: Choose from available tasks — surveys, games, app sign-ups, or daily check-ins.
q1.answer3: Complete the task as instructed to earn rewards instantly.
q1.answer4: Track your progress in the My Tasks section, and once you hit the minimum, you can cash out via your preferred payment method.

q2.question: What payout methods are available?
q2.answer: We offer multiple payout options including PayPal, Visa, Amazon Gift Cards, Worldcoin, Bitcoin, Litecoin, Dogecoin, and Solana. Choose the method that works best for you!

q3.question: How long does it take to receive my payment?
q3.answer: Most payments are processed instantly! Crypto withdrawals are typically completed within minutes, while PayPal and gift cards may take up to 24 hours during peak times.

q4.question: How does the referral program work?
q4.answer: Invite friends using your unique referral link and earn 10% of everything they earn forever. There is no limit to how many friends you can refer or how much you can earn.

q5.question: Is Labwards free to use?
q5.answer: Absolutely! Labwards is 100% free to join and use. There are no hidden fees, subscriptions, or costs. You earn real money simply by completing tasks.

support.faq1_q: How do I withdraw my earnings?
support.faq1_a: Go to your Wallet, select a withdrawal method, and follow the instructions. Minimum withdrawal is $5.
support.faq2_a: Tasks may take 24-48 hours to verify. Make sure you completed all requirements and submitted proof if requested.
support.faq3_q: How do I increase my daily streak?
support.faq3_a: Log in daily and complete at least one task or survey to maintain your streak.
